text.message: Thank you for saving me lol
Can’t to jack with my cards
Pretty early for a double steal
ok i think i have army lol
Yeah your setup guaranteed that lol
I have no port and no road chances
Yeah not sure how black didn’t go after oj for the plow
Oj about to settle on that 9 and quickly settle on the 5/2 wheat port after
Lmao you will not be stuck at that point
If we ignore you oj, you win
stuck with road and wheat port?
Red you moved it before I said yes
I said yes after you moved it lol
Red - that was good faith, but my yes came in after you placed
dear god 6 robbers in a row
Why can’t I roll a 7 lol
Here comes a 7 out and I literally asked for it lol
Whoops, clicked next before using my knight lmao
Can’t wait to join the army race
We’re running out of knights blue
I can’t get army or road but I am the steal, make it make sense
I meant mine aren’t non knights
Oj we got hosed with this 9 brick lol
Red how many VPs you got? Since I only have 1?
Had that RB for a while
I have one more of those
Truly incredible blocking and stealing here
